achievements.title: EXTRA: Bat Country
achievements.description: Reach Level 80 in Inverse Mad Forest.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Astral Stair
achievements.description: Reach Level 80 in Inverse Inlaid Library.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Mazerella
achievements.description: Reach Level 80 in Inverse Dairy Plant.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Tiny Bridge
achievements.description: Reach Level 80 in Inverse Gallo Tower.

achievements.title: Lama
achievements.description: Survive 20 minutes with at least +10% Curse.
achievements.notes: The actual unlock condition is to have any amount of Curse higher than the base value at the end of a 20+ minute run.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Gazebo
achievements.notes: Used to be unlocked by evolving Gaze of Gaea into Embrace of Gaea.

achievements.title: Torrona's Box
achievements.description: Hold 6 different weapon evolutions at once.

achievements.title: Suor Clerici
achievements.description: Recover a lifetime total of 1000 HP.

achievements.title: Dommario
achievements.description: Earn 5000 coins in a single run.

achievements.title: Bracelet
achievements.description: Survive 30 minutes with either Gallo or Divano.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Parm Aegis
achievements.description: Find a Parm Aegis in The Coop.
achievements.notes: Parm Aegis can also be unlocked by finding it as a stage item in any other stage besides The Coop.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Karoma's Mana
achievements.description: Find a Karoma's Mana in Westwoods.
achievements.notes: Karoma's Mana can also be unlocked by finding it as a stage item in any other stage besides Westwoods.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Carlo Cart
achievements.description: Deal a total of 25120 damage with the Laborratory Train.

achievements.title: Randomazzo
achievements.notes: Until Randomazzo has been found, other Arcana-related achievements are not visible.

achievements.title: Glass Vizard
achievements.description: Find and buy the Glass Vizard.

achievements.title: Forbidden Scrolls
achievements.description: Find the Forbidden Scrolls of Morbane.
achievements.notes: Unlocks secrets and spells

achievements.title: The Eudaimonia Machine
achievements.description: Obtain all standard relics from all stages.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Adventures
achievements.description: Obtain the Atlas Gate in Boss Rash.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Apoplexy
achievements.description: Find the Apoplexy at minute 9:00 in Bat Country.
achievements.notes: (outdated image)

achievements.title: EXTRA: Trisection
achievements.description: Find the Trisection in Astral Stair.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Brave Story
achievements.description: Find the Brave Story at minute 18 in Space 54.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Game Speed Modifier
achievements.description: Find the Roast chicken with a clock in the middle at the end of The Coop.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Masquerade
achievements.description: Find the Masquerade Relic in Westwoods.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Preserve
achievements.description: Find the Wax Fetish in Mazerella.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Chaos Malachite
achievements.description: Find the Chaos Malachite at minute 18:00 in Bat Country.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Chaos Rosalia
achievements.description: Find the Chaos Rosalia in Astral Stair.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Chaos Lazulia
achievements.description: Find the Chaos Lazulia in Mazerella.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Chaos Altemanna
achievements.description: Find the Chaos Altemanna in Tiny Bridge.

achievements.title: Coffin: Mad Forest
achievements.description: Find and open the coffin in the Mad Forest.

achievements.title: Coffin: Inlaid Library
achievements.description: Find and open the coffin in the Inlaid Library.

achievements.title: Coffin: Dairy Plant
achievements.description: Find and open the coffin in the Dairy Plant.

achievements.title: Coffin: Gallo Tower
achievements.description: Find and open the coffin in the Gallo Tower.

achievements.title: Coffin: Cappella Magna
achievements.description: Find and open the coffin in the Cappella Magna.

achievements.title: Mortaccio
achievements.notes: Only Skeletons count towards the defeated enemy total.

achievements.title: Yatta Cavallo
achievements.description: Defeat a total of 3000 Lion Heads.
achievements.notes: Only Lionheads, count towards defeated enemy total.

achievements.title: Bianca Ramba
achievements.description: Defeat a total of 3000 Milk Elementals.

achievements.title: O'Sole Meeo
achievements.description: Defeat a total of 3000 Dragon Shrimps.
achievements.notes: Only Dragon Shrimp, Flame Dragon Shrimp, Serpentine Dragon Shrimp, Serpentine Flame Dragon Shrimp count toward the defeated enemy total.

achievements.title: Sir Ambrojoe
achievements.description: Defeat a total of 6000 Stage Killers.
achievements.notes: Only Stage Killer and Elite Stage Killer count toward the defeated enemy total.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Ammo Appalate
achievements.description: Defeat a total of 251096 Shooting Enemies.

achievements.title: Victory Sword
achievements.description: Defeat 100000 enemies in a single run with Queen Sigma.

achievements.title: Hyper Mad Forest
achievements.description: Defeat the giant Blue Venus in the Mad Forest.
achievements.notes: Killing the Giant Blue Venus in a stage other than Mad Forest does not count.

achievements.title: Hyper Inlaid Library
achievements.description: Defeat the Hag in the Inlaid Library.
achievements.notes: Killing the Hag in a stage other than Inlaid Library does not count.

achievements.title: Hyper Dairy Plant
achievements.description: Defeat the Sword Guardian in the Dairy Plant.
achievements.notes: Killing the Sword Guardian in a stage other than Dairy Plant does not count.

achievements.title: Hyper Gallo Tower
achievements.description: Defeat the Giant Enemy Crab in the Gallo Tower.
achievements.notes: Killing the Giant Enemy Crab in a stage other than Gallo Tower does not count.

achievements.title: Hyper Cappella Magna
achievements.description: Defeat the Trinacria in the Cappella Magna.
achievements.notes: Killing the Trinacria in a stage other than Cappella Magna does not count.

achievements.title: Il Molise
achievements.description: Unlock Hyper mode any normal stages.

achievements.title: Green Acres
achievements.description: Unlock Hyper mode for 2 normal stages.

achievements.title: The Bone Zone
achievements.description: Unlock Hyper mode for 3 normal stages.

achievements.title: Moongolow
achievements.description: Unlock Hyper mode for 4 normal stages.

achievements.title: Boss Rash
achievements.description: Unlock Hyper mode for all 5 normal stages.

achievements.title: Game Killer
achievements.description: Defeat the final enemy in the Cappella Magna.

achievements.title: V - Chaos in the Dark Night
achievements.unlocks: V - Chaos in the Dark Night

achievements.title: VIII - Mad Groove
achievements.description: Reach minute 31 in the Mad Forest.
achievements.notes: Can also be achieved by defeating The Reaper.

achievements.title: XII - Out of Bounds
achievements.description: Reach minute 31 in the Gallo Tower.
achievements.notes: Can also be achieved by defeating The Reaper.

achievements.title: XV - Disco of Gold
achievements.description: Reach minute 31 in the Inlaid Library.
achievements.notes: Can also be achieved by defeating The Reaper.

achievements.title: XX - Silent Old Sanctuary
achievements.description: Reach minute 31 in the Dairy Plant.
achievements.notes: Can also be achieved by defeating The Reaper.

achievements.title: Skip 3
achievements.description: Survive 30 minutes in The Bone Zone.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Seal I
achievements.description: Banish 10 or more weapons in a single run.
achievements.notes: You can satisfy this by banishing passive items as well.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Seal II
achievements.description: Banish 20 or more weapons in a single run.
achievements.notes: You can satisfy this by banishing passive items as well.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Seal III
achievements.description: Banish 40 or more weapons in a single run.
achievements.notes: You can satisfy this by banishing passive items as well.

achievements.title: EXTRA: Seal All
achievements.description: Banish 80 or more weapons in a single run.
achievements.notes: You can satisfy this by banishing passive items as well.

achievements.title: Queen Sigma
achievements.notes: Does not include the Victory Sword or Sole Solution.

achievements.title: Phieraggi
achievements.description: Evolve and unite the Phiera Der Tuphello and Eight The Sparrow.

achievements.title: Fuwalafuwaloo
achievements.description: Unite Vento Sacro and Bloody Tear.

achievements.title: Tri-Bracelet
achievements.description: Evolve the Bracelet and then the Bi-Bracelet.

achievements.title: Candybox
achievements.description: Discover every standard evolution and union.

achievements.title: EXTRA: I - Sapphire Mist
achievements.description: Reach a Cooldown bonus of -85% with Space Dude.

achievements.title: EXTRA: III - Hidden Anathema
achievements.description: Eat as much as possible with Gazebo.

achievements.title: EXTRA: V - Pale Diamond Incursion
achievements.description: Find 10 Golden Treasure Chests in a single run with Zi'Appunta.

achievements.title: EXTRA: X - Hail from the Future
achievements.description: Trigger a Weird Souls Purifier with Santa Ladonna.

achievements.title: EXTRA: XII - Crystal Cries
achievements.description: Trigger a Starry Heavens with She-Moon Eeta.

achievements.title: EXTRA: XIII - Call of a Mad Moon
achievements.unlocks: XIII - Call of a Mad Moon

achievements.title: EXTRA: XVIII - Victorian Horror
achievements.description: Survive 30 minutes with no weapons in Inverse Green Acres.

achievements.title: EXTRA: XXI - Wandering the Jet Black
achievements.description: Reach 665 Max Health with Bat Robbert.

achievements.title: EXTRA: World of Light and Dark
achievements.description: Complete once the adventure World of Light and Dark.
achievements.unlocks: New starting weapon for Imelda Belpaese
achievements.notes: Unlocks the skin Unblinded Imelda Belpaese that allows Imelda to have a new starting weapon: Level 5 Empty Tomes.

achievements.title: EXTRA: A Garlic Paradise
achievements.description: Complete once the adventure A Garlic Paradise.
achievements.unlocks: New starting weapon for Poe Ratcho
achievements.notes: Unlocks the skin Retired Poe Ratcho that allows Poe to have a new starting weapon: Level 5 Pummarolas.

achievements.title: EXTRA: To End An Ice Age
achievements.description: Complete once the adventure To End An Ice Age.
achievements.unlocks: New starting weapon for She-Moon Eeta
achievements.notes: Unlocks the skin Reborn She-Moon Eeta that allows She-Moon to have new starting weapons: Level 5 Wings and a hidden Valkyrie Turner.

secrets.description: Follow the trail after pillaging Pummarola and Skull O'Maniac from the Mad Forest.
It is tangible only in the inverted Inlaid Library. Good friends might then show the way.
Deal with the consequence of stealing cheese from the Dairy Plant.
Investigate the bottom of Gallo Tower.
With a pure heart and two good friends, visit the fiery balcony in Cappella Magna.
Be a good boy in Il Molise.
Run away from Moongolow with all 16 accessories mastered.
With the most adverse fate in Green Acres, run off the edge of the world.
Find the only one place where flowers bloom in The Bone Zone.
Survive the Boss Rash with just one weapon.
Settle the score with the Reaper.
1) Cast the spell x-x1viiq.
2) Uppercut a non-red reaper.
3) Sometimes you just need to ask for help.
Look under previously owned coffins.
It's as simple as ABC: obtain the ring of rings.
Her royal shadow lies behind the 46th door.
Witness the 17th Colossus wander to new horizons.
Discover the source of the roaring thunder on the Tiny Bridge.
Forsake victory in favor of sightseeing in Carlo Cart.
Spend your afterparty with the foolish high roller.
Quickly break the bounds of Space and find Love.
Be the Clock Tower.
Acquire all the... books?
Reconnect the youngest hunter with her original guardian, his friends, and their doubles.
Entrust their care to the gentlest soul, twice.
Entrust their care to the gentlest soul, twice.
Slay the Castle's denizens under the Blue Crescent Moon to make him a beast.
You don't need his services if you can walk on water.
Pay a coin for every book he keeps.
Survive while wearing a fully armed coat.
Witness the Burning Alcarde three times.
Shelter their twin souls with holy magic to restore their humanity.
Drain the crimson "paint" from his most lively works.
Save the son with holy magic before the transformation is complete.
Burn bright until the end while rejecting all but the inferno.
Undo the fused demon with she whom seeks perfect balance.
Perfectly balance the darkest and brightest of Glyphs.
Bring bad luck to the count's belligerent bosses.
Rewrite the fate of the damsel in distress.
Let the alchemist personally avenge his family.
May the power of the first Belmont break her mask.
Let the souls of the damned get their revenge on the other Count.
Just go low and defeat 3,000,000 of those jokers.
Try 3000. Or 6000. Or more. hopefully their tiny ears will listen at some point.
Prove to them that there is something that spins better than axes.
Turn her from a blue shadow into a real crystal.
Give the deciever a taste of her own medicine.
It takes exactly two to empty the cauldron.
Snipe the sniper down with a stellar hit.
Let no Shadow fall on the founder of Ecclesia.
Destroy his black wings with the Morris tale is yet untold.
Make it feel at home.
A secret so big it won't pass through the Castle's doors.
Ravage everything and everyone in Dracula's Castle while in her demonic form.
Find the greatest treasure of the vampires and prove that the other Count can wreck havoc in the Castle.
Unleash maximised Death on the Castle while holding the soul-stealing stones.
Hold the stones that birthed your lineage and prove you hold dominance over all your monstrous minions.
Exhaust the rest of this miserable pile of secrets.
Combine Heaven and Cross with the Grave Inheritor of Vampire Killer.
Cut butter with six swords forged to slay vampires.
Send Simon on a windy quest beneath a gorgeous moon.
Practice non-violence amongst the flowers with the charmed young Morris.
Slay 10,000 Red foes that deny Death.
Build one tower inside another.
Let Hakuba rebuke the lying Reaper to reveal her allies' truth.
Eat the souls of 10,000 Forest frogs.
Spell the ruler's word.
Witness the 7th rebirth of Dracula's niece on holy ground.
Combine holy liquids in a sunken city.
Slay an elder crone with a riotous young witch where a stone mask sleeps.
Defeat the Chronomancer with Dracula's Reincarnation after the clock strikes 30.
Slay an inverted skeletal sphere with the Vessel of Dominus.
Find the final form of the Librarian's offerings.
Defeat Death's demonic knight duo with Dracula's smallest henchman.
Gather the largest cadre of cats, including those that want to fight.
Defy the call to adventure in Emerald Diorama.
End anguish with an otherworldly melody as the greatest mechanical songstress.
Let the last ruler re-freeze his most monstrous form.
